heading.description: Short milestone label for the timeline milestone item.

description.description: One specific explanatory sentence tied to the slide objective.
description.example: This milestone marks the decision point that changes the learner's interpretation.

icon_name.description: Required Remix Icon class because the current timelineMilestone BlockSpec requires icons.

items.heading: Critical Milestone
items.description: This milestone marks the decision point that changes the learner's interpretation.

items.heading: Visible Result
items.description: This result shows the practical effect learners should remember after the slide.

validation_rules: Block type must be exactly smart_layout.
Items must use the current v2 smart-layout item shape: heading, description, and icon_name.
Each primary item description must be 12-15 words.
Every item must include icon_name with a valid Remix Icon class.
The generated block must contain exactly the item count requested by the v2 prompt.
Current timelineMilestone BlockSpec profiles support 2-4 items for milestone_normal or 5-6 items for milestone_extended.
Do not add fields that the v2 prompt does not request.
